title: 6 Pcs Spoon Rest Set, Stainless Steel Spoon Holders for Stove Top, Ergonomic Spoons Spatula Ladle Holders, Metal Utensil Rests with Hooks, Easy Clean Kitchen Tools, 3.8×10"
features: Convenient Set: Includes 6 stainless steel spoon rests, offering sufficient quantity to meet your daily use needs; each rest measures 3.8×10 inches, large enough for keeping various spoons, ladles, or spatulas organized and accessible
Reliable Stainless Steel: Crafted from quality stainless steel, our spoon
holders are resistant to rust and corrosion; they maintain sturdiness and shape without easy deformation or warping over time; ideal for any busy kitchen

Convenient Designs: The ergonomic spoon-shaped design is great for resting spoons and other utensils comfortably; the smooth reflective surface is easy to clean and maintain (dishwasher safe); no more messy countertops

Convenient Storage: Equipped with convenient hooks for easy hanging and storage; keeps the kitchen organized and clean; the smooth curved design ensures stable placement while avoiding scratching the stovetop
